name: Master Service Agreement - TechCorp
description: Standard Master Service Agreement with TechCorp India Pvt. Ltd. covering software development and maintenance services for FY 2024-25.

name: Employment Contract Template
description: Standard employment contract template for full-time employees including non-compete, confidentiality, and IP assignment clauses as per Indian labor laws.

name: Non-Disclosure Agreement - Vendor
description: Bilateral NDA template for use with vendors, consultants, and third-party service providers. Includes 3-year confidentiality period.

name: GDPR Compliance Policy
description: Internal policy document outlining GDPR compliance procedures for handling EU customer data, including data processing agreements and breach notification protocols.

name: Articles of Association
description: Company's Articles of Association as registered with the Registrar of Companies. Includes amendments made during last AGM.

name: Software License Agreement - Enterprise
description: Enterprise software licensing agreement template with perpetual license, maintenance, and support terms. Includes source code escrow provisions.

name: Sexual Harassment Policy (POSH)
description: Prevention of Sexual Harassment policy as required under the POSH Act 2013. Includes complaint redressal mechanism and ICC constitution details.

name: Data Processing Agreement - AWS
description: Data Processing Agreement with Amazon Web Services for cloud infrastructure services. Includes Standard Contractual Clauses for international data transfers.

name: Board Resolution - FY2024 Budget
description: Board resolution approving the annual budget and business plan for Financial Year 2024-25. Certified copy with director signatures.

name: IT Security Policy
description: Comprehensive IT security policy covering access controls, password policies, incident response, and acceptable use. ISO 27001 aligned.

name: Lease Agreement - Bangalore Office
description: Commercial lease agreement for the Bangalore office premises. 5-year term with renewal option and 10% annual escalation.

name: Employee Handbook 2024
description: Comprehensive employee handbook covering company policies, benefits, leave entitlements, code of conduct, and grievance procedures.

name: Shareholders Agreement
description: Shareholders agreement between founding members covering voting rights, transfer restrictions, drag-along/tag-along rights, and exit provisions.

name: Vendor Code of Conduct
description: Code of conduct for vendors and suppliers covering ethical standards, anti-bribery, environmental compliance, and labor practices.

name: Service Level Agreement - IT Support
description: SLA with internal IT support team defining response times, escalation procedures, and service availability targets.

name: Old Marketing Agreement - Archived
description: Expired marketing services agreement with previous agency. Retained for reference and audit purposes.
